name: Thalassa Vane-Tempest
summary: Highly experienced Site Reliability Engineer with over 10 years of expertise in designing scalable, fault-tolerant distributed systems. Proven track record in automating infrastructure lifecycle management and optimizing cloud-native performance for high-traffic global platforms.

experience.title: Senior SRE
experience.description: Lead the migration of legacy monolithic services to a microservices architecture on Kubernetes, reducing deployment latency by 40 percent. Manage multi-region cloud infrastructure and implement robust observability stacks using Prometheus and Grafana.

experience.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
experience.description: Architected automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Terraform, significantly improving release frequency. Maintained 99.99 percent uptime for core customer-facing APIs through proactive incident response and chaos engineering.

experience.title: Systems Administrator
experience.description: Managed large-scale Linux server environments and optimized database performance for high-concurrency web applications. Developed internal tooling in Python to automate routine server maintenance tasks.

education.degree: Master of Science in Distributed Systems
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
